text: To argue that Mwai Kibaki was the sole or direct cause of the 2007/08 Post-Election Violence (PEV) is historically inaccurate, overly simplistic, and factually incomplete. 🧵
Opportunist propaganda, If plenty of Ksh were sent your way from UDA, you would be spinning about tutam

Maria Sarungi Gaidi wa Mtandaoni anayeishi maisha yake kwa kulipwa kwa kazi ya kuhamasisha vijana kufanya maandamano ya vurugu, amepata pigo kubwa baada ya vijana wanaoishi katika maisha magumu Tanzania kugoma kusambaza ujumbe wa vurugu walizopanga kuzifanya Julai 7 nchini Tanzania. Sijui kama Maria Sarungi na Gaidi mwenzake Mange Kimambi na wanaharakati wenzao wanaolipwa kwa matukio ya kuleta vurugu na maafa Tanzania wana taarifa kuwa vijana waliowatumia katika vurugu za Oktoba 29 mwaka 2025 wameuza ramani yote ikiwemo kukataa kusambaza vikaratasi vya kuhamasisha vurugu kwa kulipwa pesa. Vijana hao wamesema walirubuniwa na fedha mwaka jana wakaambiwa mjitokeze kufanya vurugu kwa kuchoma moto majengo na miundombinu muhimu ya Serikali kwa lengo la kuipindua nchi huku wakithibitishiwa kuwa Polisi hawatawaona kwa sababu walipewa dawa za kishirikina kuoga, yale yale ya vita vya Maji Maji!!!!. Watu mnajifanya washua kumbe washirikina wakubwa!! Wametoboa siri na kusema walikusanywa kwenye maeneo ambapo (siwezi kuyataja kwa kuwa wamiliki ni sehemu ya wanaopaswa kuchukuliwa hatua) walifundishwa mbinu za kufanya mashambulizi na wakiwa huko walipewa simu zilizotumika kufanya mawasiliano ya mud awa kuanza vurugu, fedha, chakula, vinywaji na vilevi vikali, bangi na madawa ya kulevya ikiwemo Skanka ili kuwasaidia kuchangamka wakati wanafanya uhalifu na vurugu. Vijana wanasema waliambiwa wafanye vurugu zao hadi saa 12 jioni watakapoingia wazee wa kazi kuchukua nafasi yao ya vurugu za kumaliza kazi ya kuipindua nchi. Ninachojiuliza hao wazee ni kina nani, walipanga kufanya nini baada ya saa 12 jioni kama sio hao walioua watu majumbani? nchi waliyokuwa wanaipindua ilikuwa na Serikali? Mbona siku ya Uchaguzi Kura zilikuwa hazijahesabiwa na haikujulikani mshindi? Sasa hapa nani alikuwa anaingilia mchakato wa kidemokrasia? Wakati huo huo, vijana hao wanasema baada ya vyombo vya ulinzi na usalama kuanza kuchukua hatua za kulinda maisha ya watu na mali zao kwa kutumia nguvu na hali kuwa tete, ndipo walipoanza kupoteana na kukimbia kwenye mapori na chini ya madaraja huku wakikosa chakula na vinywaji kwa kuwa hakukua na huduma ya soko na maduka pesa mifukoni. Waliowatuma hawakupokea simu zao kabisa. Hapo ndipo walipoanza kuchinja mbwa na paka kufanya kitoweo kwani hawakuwa na mahali pa kupata chakula. Vijana hao wamelaani kwa kusema wengine walikamatwa na kufunguliwa mashitaka mahakamani lakini hawakuwaona waliowatuma kufanya vurugu kuwatetea hadi pale walipopata msamaha wa Rais. Kiukweli wamesema wanajuta kushiriki katika matukio ambayo hawayajui sababu na chanzo chake kwa kuwa wao wanatumika kufanikisha mipango inayowanufaisha watu ambao wanawatumia tu kupata pesa kwa kuwa ni rahisi kushawishika kwa fedha kidogo kutokana na hali zao za umaskini. Wamewataka vijana wenzao kujifunza kutokana na vurugu zilizopita ambapo kuna vijana walifunguliwa kesi, wengine walipoteza maisha na wengine kujeruhiwa huku wanaowahamasisha wakinufaika kwa kulipwa fedha nyingi ughaibuni ambako wanaishi maisha ya kifahari. Wazazi waelekezeni vijana kuacha kufuata mkumbo wa watu wanaotosha uchochezi na maneno ya chuki mitandaoni wakiwa nje ya nchi wakisubiri Watoto wenu kufanya vurugu na kuchukuliwa hatua huku wao wakilipwa pesa nyingi. Hakuna nchi duniani inaruhusu mapinduzi. Kesi ya Uhaini ni ngumu. Wanaotaka Madaraka ni vema wakatumia njia halali. Hii mtasubiri sana huku kina Maria na Mange wakiokota dol ana kuishi kifahari na Watoto wao huko ughaibuni.

When the same police were killing Gen Zs, they kept quiet. I said that sooner or later, those guns will be pointed at them. Anarchy eats its own. It's time people realize the danger we face in this lawlessness era.

When 2027 comes, he understands it's not about one term or tutam, everyone will be voting on their favouring dynamics. That's the Kenyan electorate. I wouldn't celebrate this early.

RT @FGaitho237: Pauline Njoroge’s Conspicuous Silence: The Scripted Theatre of the United Opposition in Ol Kalou Pauline Njoroge, as Deputy Secretary General of the Jubilee Party, did not share even a single post on her sizable social media platform about their Ol Kalou candidate. Not one. Despite her huge following and supposed position of influence, she remained conspicuously silent. This was not an oversight. It was the political script of the day. The fringe parties of the so-called United Opposition were strategically told to keep off Ol Kalou so as to present the optics of a dominant kingpin and a powerful DCP. The real game was never about winning fairly - it’s about getting the nomination certificate through this manufactured dominance, a scam that will elevate the next wave of quacks, scammers, and hoodlums to important offices like MCAs and MPs in 2027. Mount Kenya remains trapped in this vicious cycle of failed leadership and recycled mediocrity. There was even literal conflict, with Rigathi Gachagua warning Linda Mwananchi not to campaign in Ol Kalou. Is that democracy? Of course not. It is pure optics - a choreographed performance designed to crown one faction while sidelining others. The entire internet space was flooded with coverage of only two candidates by deliberate design. This explains the embarrassingly low voter turnout of around 49%. When people are not inspired by the dominant political choices on offer, apathy becomes the rational response. See the scam clearly. Do not get roped in by these fossil politicians and their dying brand of politics. The United Opposition is not offering change - it is offering a rebranded version of the same old game, complete with warnings, exclusions, and manufactured dominance. Ol Kalou was never a genuine contest of ideas. It was a stage-managed spectacle meant to legitimize the next set of opportunists. Kenyans must remain vigilant. The fossils are still playing the same tired script, and the people deserve far better than this recycled theatre. The real battle is not between these manufactured factions. It is between the people and the entire broken system that keeps recycling failure. Do not fall for the optics.
